title: StreamVault — OTT Platform
description: A Netflix-style full-stack OTT platform with JWT authentication, role-based access control, and an admin panel. Built with React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB.

title: Crowd-Sourced Gadget Reviews
description: Full-stack app where users post and review gadgets with star ratings, comments, and image uploads. Features JWT auth and secure password hashing.

title: Netflix Clone
description: Responsive Netflix-style app built with React.js, integrating TMDB API for dynamic movie/TV content and Firebase for secure user authentication.

title: Awwwards-Style Website
description: Animation-rich interactive website using GSAP, featuring scroll-triggered effects, smooth transitions, and an immersive modern UI.

title: React Portfolio
description: Fully responsive portfolio with React Router and CSS Modules, featuring interactive modals, image galleries, and validated contact forms.
